description: Procurement of 202 M-9 railcars (92 base + 110 option) for LIRR. Replaces M3 railcar fleet built 1980s. PTC-ready, self-propelled EMU. Awarded to Kawasaki in September 2013. Total budget $733.6M.

payload.description: Procurement of 202 M-9 railcars (92 base + 110 option) for LIRR. Replaces M3 railcar fleet built 1980s. PTC-ready, self-propelled EMU. Awarded to Kawasaki in September 2013. Total budget $733.6M.

records.raw_text: LIRR M-9 Railcar Procurement - 202 cars (92 base + 110 option). Awarded to Kawasaki Sep 2013. Budget $733.6M. Replaces M3 fleet.

payload.description: Partnership with NYCDOT to ticket vehicles in bus lanes using automated camera enforcement on buses

records.raw_text: Automatic Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) - Partnership with NYCDOT and NYCDOT to ticket vehicles in the bus lanes. System now on 123 buses and operating on 8 routes in Manhattan and Brooklyn.

payload.description: Structural changes reduce obscuration by approximately 50%. Over 1,700 buses have Hi-Vis Windows. All new buses come equipped.

records.raw_text: Hi-Vis Windows - Structural changes reduce obscuration by ~50%. Over 1,700 buses currently have Hi-Vis Windows. All new buses come equipped.

payload.description: Provide next stop information, service alerts, and digital content. Over 2,700 buses equipped. All new buses come equipped.

records.raw_text: Digital Information Screens (DIS) - Provide customers with next stop information, service alerts, and digital content. Over 2,700 buses equipped. All new buses come equipped.

payload.description: Audible announcement outside the bus when the bus makes a turn. Over 1,200 buses equipped. All new buses come equipped.

records.raw_text: Pedestrian Turn Warning (PTW) - Audible announcement outside the bus when the bus makes a turn. Over 1,200 buses are currently equipped with PTW. All new buses come equipped.

payload.description: Launched on SI express service in 2018 allowing customers to see seat availability. Expanded to all boroughs July 2020. Over 2,400 buses equipped. All new buses come equipped.

records.raw_text: Automatic Passenger Counters (APC) - Launched on SI express service in 2018. Expanded to all boroughs in July 2020. Over 2,400 buses currently equipped with APC. All new buses come equipped.

payload.description: Interior and exterior cameras improve situational awareness for incident investigations. Over 4,100 buses equipped. All new buses come equipped.

records.raw_text: Advanced Camera Systems - Interior and exterior cameras improve situational awareness for incident investigations. Over 4,100 buses currently equipped with cameras. All new buses come equipped.

payload.description: Communicates with NYC traffic center to shorten red or extend green lights to allow buses to travel without stopping

records.raw_text: Transit Signal Priority (TSP) - Communicates with NYC traffic center to shorten red or extend green lights to allow buses to travel without stopping
